center.name: 阿德默勒尔蒂群岛
center.summary: 阿德默勒尔蒂群岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Bismarck black myzomela、Singing starling，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to the Admiralty and St Matthias islands (Bismarck Islands, Papua New Guinea)

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Singing starlings are found in New Guinea and some adjacent islands, the Bismarck Archipelago, Admiralty Islands and Solomon Islands

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is native to the Admiralty and St Matthias islands (Bismarck Islands, Papua New Guinea)

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Singing starlings are found in New Guinea and some adjacent islands, the Bismarck Archipelago, Admiralty Islands and Solomon Islands
